meta.title: EV Charge Tracker - Track Your EV Costs
meta.description: Track your electric vehicle charging sessions and expenses, monitor costs per kilometer, and optimize your EV charging experience with our iOS app.
hero.title: Track Your EV car costs with precision
hero.description: Take control of your electric vehicle expenses. Whether you charge at home, at work, or at public charging stations, get clear insights into what your EV really costs to run.
showcase.alt.carRideStats: Cost per kilometer analysis screen showing charging session details and driving efficiency metrics
showcase.alt.carStats: Smart statistics screen displaying expense charts for the last 6 months
showcase.alt.carExpenses: Detailed expenses history screen with charging sessions and cost records
showcase.alt.plannedMaintenance: Planned maintenance screen showing scheduled service tasks and reminders
showcase.card1.title: Cost Per Kilometer Analysis
showcase.card1.description: See exactly how much each kilometer costs you to drive. Compare charging sessions and track how your driving efficiency impacts your expenses over time.
showcase.card2.title: Smart stats
showcase.card2.description: The app will show you expense stats for last 6 months.
showcase.card3.title: Detailed Expenses History
showcase.card3.description: Log every charging session and expenses with important details including energy consumed and cost. Build a complete picture of your EV expenses patterns.
showcase.card4.title: Planned Maintenance
showcase.card4.description: Plan your maintenance/service tasks and get reminders when to perform them. You can add additional information that will be helpful for the service provider.
showcase.card5.title: How it works
showcase.card5.step2: Log first charging session or expenses.
showcase.card5.step3: See your expenses history and costs.
callout.text: Built for people who want to track their electric vehicle expenses history and costs.
legal.text: All your data is stored locally on your device. We do not collect, transfer, or share your personal information with any third parties. Use EV Charge Tracker in accordance with Apple's Terms of Service and applicable laws.
footer.slogan: Track your EV car costs with precision
footer.copyright: Made with ❤️, coffee and claude by
faq.a1: EV Charge Tracker is an iOS app that helps you track your electric vehicle charging sessions and expenses, monitor costs per kilometer, and optimize your EV charging experience.
faq.q2: How does EV Charge Tracker work?
faq.a2: Add your car to track, log your first charging session or expenses, and see your expenses history and costs with detailed charts and statistics.
faq.a3: All your data is stored locally on your device. We do not collect, transfer, or share your personal information with any third parties.
privacy.meta.title: Privacy Policy - EV Charge Tracker
privacy.meta.description: Privacy Policy for EV Charge Tracker iOS app. Learn how we handle your data, protect your privacy, and store all information locally on your device.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy for EV Charge Tracker
privacy.intro.heading: Introduction
privacy.intro.text: EV Charge Tracker ("we", "our", or "the app") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our iOS application.
privacy.collect.heading: Information We Collect
privacy.collect.provide.heading: Information You Provide
privacy.collect.provide.text: When you use EV Charge Tracker, you may provide the following information:
privacy.collect.provide.charging: Charging Session Data: Date, time, location, duration, and cost of charging sessions
privacy.collect.provide.vehicle: Vehicle Information: Vehicle model, battery capacity, and related specifications
privacy.collect.provide.expense: Expense Records: Charging costs, maintenance expenses, and other vehicle-related financial data
privacy.collect.provide.notes: Notes and Custom Data: Any personal notes or custom information you choose to add to your records
privacy.collect.auto.heading: Automatically Collected Information
privacy.collect.auto.location: Location Data: If you enable location services, we may collect location information to automatically log charging locations
privacy.collect.auto.usage: Usage Data: Information about how you use the app, including features accessed and app performance data
privacy.collect.auto.device: Device Information: Device type, operating system version, and app version
privacy.use.heading: How We Use Your Information
privacy.use.text: We use the collected information to:
privacy.use.core: Provide core app functionality for tracking charging sessions and expenses
privacy.use.reports: Generate reports and analytics about your charging history and costs
privacy.use.improve: Improve app performance and user experience
privacy.use.stats: Calculate statistics such as cost per charge, total expenses, and charging patterns
privacy.storage.heading: Data Storage
privacy.storage.text: All your personal data (charging sessions, vehicle information, expenses) is stored locally on your device. We do not transfer your personal data to external servers.
privacy.icloud.heading: iCloud Backup
privacy.icloud.text: EV Charge Tracker offers iCloud backup functionality to help you safeguard your data and sync it across your Apple devices. When you enable iCloud backup in the app:
privacy.icloud.backup: Your charging sessions, vehicle data, and expense records are backed up to your personal iCloud account
privacy.icloud.encrypted: Backups are encrypted by Apple and protected by your Apple ID
privacy.icloud.access: Data is accessible only through your iCloud account
privacy.icloud.apple: Backup and sync is subject to Apple's Privacy Policy
privacy.icloud.disable: You can enable or disable iCloud backup at any time in the app settings. If disabled, all data remains stored locally on your device only.
privacy.location.heading: Location Services
privacy.location.text: If you grant location permissions, we use your location data to:
privacy.location.tag: Automatically tag charging sessions with location information
privacy.location.identify: Help you identify where you charged your vehicle
privacy.location.revoke: You can revoke location permissions at any time through your device settings. The app will continue to function without location services, but you'll need to manually enter location information if desired.
privacy.analytics.heading: Analytics
privacy.analytics.text: We use Google Analytics to collect anonymous usage data to help us understand how the app is used and improve the user experience. This includes:
privacy.analytics.patterns: App usage patterns: Which features are used, screen views, and user interactions
privacy.analytics.device: Device information: Device type, operating system version, and app version
privacy.analytics.perf: Performance data: App launch times, crashes, and errors
privacy.analytics.anonymous: Anonymous and does not include your personal charging data, vehicle information, or expense records
privacy.analytics.google: Processed by Google in accordance with Google's Privacy Policy
privacy.analytics.sole: Used solely to improve app functionality and user experience
privacy.analytics.limit: You can limit ad tracking and analytics collection through your device's privacy settings (Settings > Privacy & Security > Tracking).
privacy.sharing.heading: Data Sharing and Third Parties
privacy.sharing.text: We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal information to third parties. Your personal data (charging sessions, expenses, vehicle information) remains on your device and in your personal iCloud account (if enabled).
privacy.sharing.analytics: We share anonymous usage data with Google Analytics as described above to improve the app.
privacy.security.heading: Data Security
privacy.security.text: We implement appropriate technical measures to protect your data:
privacy.security.local: All data is stored locally on your device using iOS secure storage mechanisms
privacy.security.noTransfer: No data transmission to external servers
privacy.security.builtin: Data is protected by your device's built-in security features
privacy.rights.heading: Your Rights and Choices
privacy.rights.access: Access Your Data: All your data is accessible within the app
privacy.rights.delete: Delete Your Data: You can delete individual records or all data through the app settings
privacy.rights.export: Export Your Data: You can export your charging history and expense data from the app
privacy.rights.location: Disable Location Services: You can revoke location permissions at any time
privacy.children.heading: Children's Privacy
privacy.children.text: EV Charge Tracker is not intended for use by children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
privacy.changes.heading: Changes to This Privacy Policy
privacy.changes.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by:
privacy.changes.posting: Posting the new Privacy Policy in the app
privacy.changes.updating: Updating the "Last Updated" date at the top of this policy
privacy.changes.continued: Your continued use of the app after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.retention.heading: Data Retention
privacy.retention.text: Data is retained on your device until you manually delete it. We do not have access to your data and therefore do not control retention periods.
privacy.international.heading: International Users
privacy.international.text: Since all data is stored locally on your device, no cross-border data transfers occur. Your data remains in your physical possession.
privacy.contact.heading: Contact Us
privacy.contact.text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:
privacy.consent.heading: Consent
privacy.consent.text: By using EV Charge Tracker, you consent to this Privacy Policy and agree to its terms.
